system.description:
### Tier 2 Leader A field commander coordinating fireteams with ruthless efficiency and smoke grenades. Motives & Tactics: Mark targets, obscure, suppress

#### Features Smoke Grenade - Action: Spend 1 Fear. The Centurion creates a cloud of smoke at Close range. All creatures within the smoke are Obscured (Attacks against them have Disadvantage) and can take the Hide action as a free move.

Focus Fire - Action: Mark a Stress to spotlight 1d4 allies within range of a target they can attack without moving. On a success, their attacks deal half damage.

Tactical Shield Initialization - Reaction: When the Centurion enters in a scene, put 3 Kinetic Shield token on them.

Tactical Shield - Reaction: When the Centurion takes damage, you can remove a Kinetic Shield token to reduce that damage by 5.

}}
